summaries.text:
*📌 Key Updates*
- Deadline extended till July 13
- Custom model in development
- Error in development fixed
- Ability to play latest YouTube videos using Blinky added
- WhatsApp summarizer to be integrated in Blinky
- Feature to remind someone or bulk send messages at a particular time to be added

*✅ Decisions Made*
- Sections in college will be divided based on name (A to J and rest)

*📝 Action Items*
- [Gourish] Push documents for new changes
- [Khanna Sparsh] Continue working on custom model

*❓ Open Questions*
- How will the sections be divided in college (answered: based on name)

*⚠️ Unresolved*
- None 

Note: Some conversations were casual or joked about and didn't contribute to any important updates, decisions, or action items, so they were ignored in the summary.
